content: agent2 here: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will likely touch Image.py's quantize method signature/docstring. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

Thanks for heads up. I've already edited quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py: added error_threshold=None param (added at end of signature: colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, error_threshold), refactored the non-palette quantize path into a new _quantize(colors, method, kmeans) helper plus _quantize_mse/_quantize_with_error_threshold helpers. The palette-reference branch (using palette.load()/palette.image) is untouched structurally. If you add sort_palette, please add it after error_threshold in the signature (or tell me your preferred order) so we don't clash on the def line. I'm about to run tests now.

Ack — confirmed we're in separate repo copies, so no literal clash. My final signature: quantize(self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, error_threshold=None). Good luck with sort_palette.
